faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions about our platform and its features. If you have any other questions, please don't hesitate to contact us.

q1.question: What is Tulum?
q1.answer: A platform that helps venues bring real guests to events, manage entry, and track attendance in one place.

q2.question: Who is Tulum for?
q2.answer: For nightclubs, bars, venues, and independent event organizers.

q3.question: Is there a contract?
q3.answer: No contracts pay monthly and cancel anytime.

q4.question: Do I pay if there are no results?
q4.answer: If you're not satisfied in your first month, we'll refund you.

q5.question: How does Tulum bring guests?
q5.answer: By connecting your event with people who are actively going out.

q6.question: How does check-in work?
q6.answer: Guests scan a QR code at the entrance for instant check-in and live stats.

q7.question: Do I need special equipment?
q7.answer: No a phone or tablet with a camera is enough.

q8.question: Can I use Tulum with Instagram?
q8.answer: Yes Instagram creates buzz, Tulum delivers attendance.

q9.question: Do I get analytics?
q9.answer: Yes real-time attendance and event performance data.

q10.question: How do I get started?
q10.answer: Sign up, create your event, and publish it.

cta.title: Stop Hoping. Start Knowing.
cta.subtitle: Join venues that control their attendance instead of leaving it to chance.

footer.tagline: Platform for venues that want more guests and less stress.

testimonials.title: What People Are Saying

faqGuest.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqGuest.subtitle: Everything you need to know about using Tulum as a guest.

q1.question: How does Tulum work?
q1.answer: Tulum connects you with people who are already going to the same events as you. You discover events, join them, and match only with people who will actually be there.

q2.question: Do I have to swipe like on other apps?
q2.answer: No. You don't match with random people anymore you match with people who already share something in common with you, right now. And they're not miles away… they're right there, nearby.

q3.question: When can I start chatting with someone?
q3.answer: Chat unlocks once you match at the same event. It stays open for a short time after the event ends so you're encouraged to take the moment and meet in real life.

q4.question: Can I match with anyone anytime?
q4.answer: No. You can only match with people who are physically at the same event as you.

q5.question: Can I see who is going to an event?
q5.answer: Yes. You'll see a preview of attendees, including interests, vibe, and general ratios without compromising anyone's privacy.

q6.question: Is Tulum free to use?
q6.answer: Yes. You can use all core features for free. Premium unlocks extra visibility, insights, and advanced features.

q7.question: What does Premium give me?
q7.answer: Premium gives you more visibility, smarter filters, and more ways to connect like sending a message before matching, boosting your profile, and seeing who's interested in you.

q8.question: Is it safe?
q8.answer: Yes. We use profile verification, reporting tools, and clear community rules to keep the experience safe and respectful.

q9.question: What makes Tulum different from dating apps?
q9.answer: You don't match randomly you match through real-life events. That means less small talk and more real moments.

q10.question: What if I don't match with anyone?
q10.answer: You still go to a great event. Tulum is built around real experiences first meeting people is a bonus, not pressure.
